İpek EROL

ipek.erol

Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

İpek Erol was born in Antalya in 1993. She completed her undergraduate education at Yeditepe University, Department of Psychology in 2017 with a scholarship. In 2019, she completed the Clinical Psychology Master's program at Üsküdar University and received her specialization. In 2020, she completed the Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Master's program at Üsküdar University.
